title: Senior Software Engineer - Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates:
Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates!
